description_long: This is a rugged, rectangular yellow toolbox with a weathered, industrial appearance, featuring black accents and visible scuff marks that suggest frequent use. The top surface is adorned with a prominent black-and-yellow hazard symbol, likely indicating the storage of sensitive or hazardous tools. Two robust, metallic handles are mounted on the lid for easy carrying, and the front face displays two black latch mechanisms for secure closure. The sides are plain except for recessed panels, and the overall construction appears to be heavy-duty metal, possibly steel, with reinforced edges. The box is compact but elongated, suitable for storing a variety of hand tools or specialized equipment. Its utilitarian design and warning symbol make it well-suited for urban, construction, or industrial environments.
description: A rugged yellow metal toolbox with black handles, latch mechanisms, and a hazard symbol on top, showing signs of heavy use.
description_view_0: Front view showing two black latches, black handles on top, and a hazard symbol.
description_view_1: Side view revealing a recessed panel and the end of the top handles, with the hazard symbol partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain, recessed panel and no visible latches, but handles and hazard symbol still apparent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, with a recessed panel and partial view of the handles and hazard symbol.
attribute_handle_type: Two fixed, rectangular metal handles mounted on the lid, designed for carrying; no visible ergonomic padding.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Two black metal clasp latches on the front, likely snap-type, with no visible keyholes or combination locks.
attribute_brand_logo: A black hazard symbol (resembling a radiation warning) is centered on the top surface; no brand name or text is visible.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment implied by the box shape; no visible trays, drawers, or dividers on the exterior.
